details: The agent correctly identified the root cause: the service 'web' has selector 'app=web-backend-v2' but the actual pods are labeled 'app=web-backend', resulting in zero endpoints. The agent ran cluster commands (svc view, pods, pods view) that confirmed the mismatch, and explicitly stated the selector/label mismatch as the diagnosis. No hallucination — the evidence from the commands directly supports the conclusion.
